final:
module RefModule(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [15:0] raw_temp,
    input wire [15:0] calibration_offset,
    output reg [15:0] calibrated_temp
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        calibrated_temp <= 16'b0;
    end else begin
        calibrated_temp <= raw_temp + calibration_offset;
    end
end

endmodule
